_comment: The Tapt-owned functions the anon role is ALLOWED to execute in production.
scripts/check_anon_rpc_contract.py diffs live prod against this list on every
push that touches supabase/, scripts/, or .github/workflows/.
If CI fails on this file, do not just paste the live list in. Decide first:
- Function genuinely meant to be public (guest browsing, public web)?
Add it here WITH a reason, in the same commit that grants it.
- Function NOT meant to be public? It is almost certainly the 0081 gotcha:
Postgres grants EXECUTE to PUBLIC on every CREATE FUNCTION, so anon gets
it by default. Fix with: revoke all on function ... from public;
